issues.description: Condition 'TurnCount' is incorrect. Text says 'If you have 2 or less Life cards' which checks your current Life card count, not turn count. Should use a condition that checks Life total (no standard condition matches this exactly, but this is a static check, not a trigger condition). The DSL structure doesn't support life-count conditions; this requires clarification of intent.

Action type 'FlipLife' is incorrect for [On K.O.]. The effect states 'Add up to 1 card from the top of your opponent's Life cards to the owner's hand'. This should be a card draw/retrieval from opponent's Life zone to owner's hand. FlipLife is the wrong action type entirely. This should likely be a custom action or clarified as there is no standard action for 'steal from opponent Life pile to hand'.
